title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
